tech.title: Want to understand the current state of AI? Check out these charts.
tech.summary: If you’re following AI news, you’re probably getting whiplash. AI is a gold rush. AI is a bubble. AI is taking your job. AI can’t even read a clock. tech.title: Job titles of the future: Wildlife first responder
tech.summary: Grizzly bears have made such a comeback across eastern Montana that in 2017, the state hired its first-ever prairie-based grizzly manager: wildlife biologist Wesley Sarmento.
